message:
test: adapt test suites to new core config fields and rollback outcome

Catches up five test files with struct and enum additions that landed in
the core crate since they were last edited. No production code change.

- tests/proptest_diagnostic.rs — `DiagnosticOptions` gained an
  `include_full_cwd: bool` field. The `arb_diagnostic_options` strategy
  now populates it (default `false`); `prop_default_values` asserts the
  field defaults to `false`; `prop_default_deterministic`,
  `prop_clone_preserves_fields`, `prop_round_trip`, and the "with
  output path" case all extend their equality/clone assertions to
  cover the new field.

- tests/proptest_headless_mux_server.rs — `ServerConfig` gained a
  `max_peers: u32` field. `arb_config` now generates
  `max_peers in 1..2_000`, and the destructuring closure adds the
  `max_peers` binding to the returned struct literal.

- tests/native_mux_e2e_validation.rs — the
  `server_config_roundtrip` integration test explicitly constructs a
  `ServerConfig` literal and asserts serde round-trip equality. Adds
  `max_peers: 1_024` to the literal and a matching
  `assert_eq!(config.max_peers, deserialized.max_peers)`.

- tests/storage_labruntime.rs — `StorageConfig` gained
  `defer_fts_triggers: bool`. The `storage_handle_with_small_queue_handles_burst`
  test adds `defer_fts_triggers: false` to its literal so it still
  compiles against the current struct.

- tests/mcp_conformance_mission_tx.rs — `TxOutcome` was refined for
  the rollback path; a rolled-back contract now reports
  `TxOutcome::Compensated` rather than the old `TxOutcome::RolledBack`
  (the engine distinguishes "we ran compensations and they succeeded"
  from "we abandoned without compensating"). Updates the
  `mcp_wa_tx_roundtrip_plan_run_rollback_persists_expected_state`
  assertion accordingly; the `MissionTxState::RolledBack` state
  assertion and the `receipts.len() == 4` invariant are unchanged.
